title: Congress demands release of 46 ‘secret UFO vids’ as insiders warn ‘you’re going to see some weird f***ing s***t’
description: MEMBERS of Congress have demanded for the release of 46 military videos that insiders claim show convincing evidence that advanced, non-human craft are operating on earth. The videos - currently held by the Department of War - include 45 previously unreleased military clips. Representative Anna Paulina Luna requested the long list of videos with bombshell-titled...

title: Debate over UFOs and alien life intensifies as Trump orders for UFO data to be released
description: UFOs and UAPs have been observed for generations, and while some believe they are evidence of extraterrestrial life, the government is still investigating their origins and potential national security threats.

title: As Trump orders UFO files, question remains: What would aliens think?
description: For generations, human beings have wondered: What would alien life from another planet be like? But we rarely ask the opposite: What would they think of us? It’s a question that can produce some, well, uncomfortable answers if you happen to be an earthling. “If I were looking at Earth from a distance, I would be pretty disappointed,” theoretical physicist Avi Loeb says. “Most of our investing is dealing with conflicts to prevent other people from killing us or us killing others. Look at the Ukraine war over a little bit of territory. That is not a sign of intelligence.” [...]... Keep on reading: As Trump orders UFO files, question remains: What would aliens think?

title: As Trump orders UFO data released, a question hangs: If aliens exist, what would they think of us? (Corey Williams/Associated Press)
description: Corey Williams / Associated Press : As Trump orders UFO data released, a question hangs: If aliens exist, what would they think of us? — For generations, human beings have wondered: What would alien life from another planet be like? But we rarely ask the opposite: What would they think of us?

title: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna Presses Department of War to Release 46 Secret UFO Clips
description: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-FL) is asking the U.S. Department of War (DOW) to release nearly 50 military videos some say show Unidentified Flying Objects (UFOs) near "sensitive airspaces" of U.S military installations. The post Rep. Anna Paulina Luna Presses Department of War to Release 46 Secret UFO Clips appeared first on Breitbart .
